title: Albert Austin Reusable Christmas Bags with Colourful Designs Easy Carry Strap Non-Woven Fabric Santa-Themed Christmas Tote Bag for Presents Occasions Party Supplies (12 PACK - 4 Assorted Designs)
features: PACK OF 12 CHRISTMAS GIFT BAGS - Elevate your holiday gift-giving with this pack of 12 Christmas gift bags. Each bag features a delightful and charming holiday design, ensuring your presents are wrapped in a warm, festive embrace that brings smiles to your loved ones' faces.

REUSABLE AND STURDY - These gift bags are crafted from high-quality non-woven fabric material, providing durability. They are reusable and lightweight allowing you to easily carry along with you on trips. The bags are fade-free and odourless.

LARGE STORAGE SPACE - These Christmas gift bags are designed to accommodate a substantial quantity of toys and gifts, making them an excellent solution for oddly shaped or hard-to-wrap presents. They simplify the gift-wrapping process and enhance the delight of your friends during the holiday season.

PORTABLE AND FOLDABLE DESIGN - Featuring durable and portable design, these Christmas gift bags are easy to carry and boast vibrant, enduring colours. Place your gift inside these spacious bags, add some tissue paper, and you're all set to present it. You can store the bag when not in use.

SIZE - The Christmas gift bag has dimensions of 32.8cm (L) x 17cm (W) x 25cm (H). It comes in 4 different designs with 3 of each. Suitable for carrying a batch of cookies, treats, candies, or other thoughtful Christmas gifts intended for teachers, friends, family, or neighbours.
description: Product Description Albert Austin Pack of 12 Reusable Christmas Gift Bags with 4 Colourful Designs Easy to Carry Strap Non Woven Fabric Santa Themed Christmas Bags Ideal for Festive Occasions Party Supplies Decor 12-PACK CHRISTMAS GIFT BAGS Adorned with vibrant and festive Christmas patterns, our set of 12 gift bags features a variety of lively designs. Bring the holiday spirit to life as you store your cherished items in these bags, creating a joyful ambience for Christmas celebrations. AMPLE STORAGE SPACE These gift bags are large enough to accommodate a variety of gifts, making them perfect for all your Christmas presents. From small trinkets to larger surprises, these bags have you covered. EASY TO CARRY Designed with sturdy handles, the Christmas gift bags make carrying your presents a breeze. No more struggling with awkwardly shaped packages. These bags are convenient and lightweight. NON-WOVEN FABRIC Crafted from high-quality non-woven fabric, these large Christmas gift bags are not only durable but also wear-resistant. Share the holiday spirit with your friends and family with our gift bags. 4 COLOURFUL DESIGNS Spread cheer with a variety of colourful designs. From classic holiday bells to Santa claus and reindeer patterns, our set includes 4 different designs, ensuring there's a perfect bag for every recipient. COMPACT AND EASY TO STORE After the festivities, these gift bags fold flat for easy storage until the next holiday season. Keep them tucked away without taking up much space, ready to bring joy year after year. MULTIPURPOSE USE These versatile gift bags are suitable for birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, and other special occasions. Elevate your gift-giving experience with these charming and reusable Christmas bags.
